commands.name: links
commands.description: Extract links (and their anchor text) from an HTML file, split internal vs external.

commands.name: meta
commands.description: Extract metadata from HTML: <title>, meta description/keywords, OpenGraph, headings.

commands.name: tables
commands.description: Extract every HTML <table> as structured rows (pandas.read_html).

commands.name: text
commands.description: Extract the main readable text from an HTML file as Markdown (boilerplate-stripped).
